mods.name: MegaHoe
mods.description: Hoe tool overhaul with biome painter, extended terrain editing, and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaMegingjord
mods.description: Megingjord belt powers — carry weight, headlamp, Eitr bonus, seafloor walk, speed & jump boost

mods.name: MegaFood
mods.description: Custom food items & recipes with fermenter integration and configurable stats

mods.name: MegaShot
mods.description: Crossbow & firearms overhaul — scope/zoom, AOE, DoT, fire rate, magazine/reload system

mods.name: MegaQoL
mods.description: Quality of life — auto repair, refueller, pet feeder, craft from containers, map teleport, mass farming

mods.name: MegaFishing
mods.description: Fish auto-pull into containers/inventory with quality upgrade and configurable radius

mods.name: MegaFactory
mods.description: Auto-feed factory stations (Kiln, Smelter, Blast Furnace, Windmill, Spinning Wheel, Eitr Refinery) with work order system

mods.name: MegaTrainer
mods.description: In-game cheat trainer — god mode, fly, no cost, explore map, always rested, infinite eitr, tame all, no structure damage, fast skill up, speed/jump controls
